landing.title: Twilio Segment Customer Data Platform | Twilio
landing.text:
Twilio Segment Customer Data Platform | Twilio
___
Support
An icon of a down chevron
Help Center
Support Plans
Partner Solutions
API Status
Login
Contact sales
Start for free
Contact sales
Start for free
This website uses cookies and similar technologies to collect information you provide and information about your interactions with our sites to improve your experience, analyze performance and traffic on our website and assist our marketing efforts and customer service. We may share this information with our third-party partners. You can change your
cookie preferences here
. By continuing to browse, you agree to our use of these tools in accordance with our
Privacy Notice
and you agree to the terms of our
Terms of Service
.
OK, got it
Adjust preferences
Read our Cookie Policy
Segment ❤️ Twilio. We're finally moving in together on Twilio.com!
We're merging our websites to make things simpler. You can now find our leading customer data platform—plus, everything else Twilio offers, over on
Twilio.com
.
Visit Twilio.com
See what's possible
Same CDP, new home base.
Don’t worry—the same Segment customer data products and services, documentation and resources you know and love are available and fully supported on
Twilio.com
.
Log in now
Collect real-time data in unified profiles—and so much more
Collect, clean and activate your customer data in any tool to create context-driven experiences. Then explore the rest of the Twilio Platform for a complete solution that combines your data, communications, and AI.
Connections
Customer data pipeline
Collect first-party data from every touchpoint and activate it to the data warehouse or one of 550+ destinations for a unified customer view.
Explore Connections
View pricing
Connections + Unify + Engage
Customer Data Platform
Create unified profiles, build advanced audiences, orchestrate real-time journeys, and enhance any experience with data from the warehouse.
Explore CDP
View pricing
Explore by product
Resources to learn, build, or troubleshoot
Twilio Developer Center logo
Integrations catalog
Power the tools you already use with your data by enabling any of our 750+ integrations.
Computer playing video
Recipes
Step-by-step tutorials on how to build solutions with Twilio Segment.
A document with a lightbulb
GitHub
Libraries, integrations, and tools for collecting, transforming, and routing customer data.
An Open book
Documentation
Use up-to-date documentation to quickly integrate and send data with our customer data tools.
Shining stars
Help Center
Chat with our AI assistant to get answers to your questions, troubleshoot, or find helpful information.
Users with a heart symbol
Partners
Work with one of our trusted partners to integrate our CDP or use one of our pre-built integrations.
Twilio

Collect, clean, and activate your customer data.
Capture data from any source, enforce quality with schemas, unify customer identity, and send it to hundreds of tools — without building each integration yourself
Get started now!

Twilio Segment
Quickstarts
Connect your app to Segment
Learn more

Twilio servers
2
Your app
import
{ AnalyticsBrowser }
from
"@segment/analytics-next"
;
const
analytics
=
AnalyticsBrowser.
load
({
writeKey:
"<YOUR_WRITE_KEY>"
,
});
analytics.
track
(
"Order Completed"
, {
orderId:
"12345"
,
revenue:
99.99
,
});
3
Track once, send everywhere.

Product documentation

Product documentation

support team

Segment tag
(link takes you to an external page)
on Stack Overflow.
Terms of service
Privacy Policy
Copyright © 2026 Twilio Inc.
This website uses cookies and similar technologies to collect information you provide and information about your interactions with our sites to improve your experience, analyze performance and traffic on our website and assist our marketing efforts and customer service. We may share this information with our third-party partners. You can change your
cookie preferences here
. By continuing to browse, you agree to our use of these tools in accordance with our
Privacy Notice
and you agree to the terms of our
Terms of Service
.
OK, got it
Adjust preferences
Read our Cookie Policy
Segment receives your data and routes it to every connected destination in real-time
One API call captures event data with any properties you need — same syntax across web, mobile, and server
Your data arrives in your warehouse, analytics, and marketing tools automatically — no integration code required

analysis.name: Segment
analysis.tagline: Collect real-time data in unified profiles—and so much more
analysis.value_proposition: Collect, clean, and activate first-party customer data across 750+ integrations to create unified profiles and orchestrate personalized experiences at scale.
analysis.ideal_customer: Engineering, data, and marketing teams at growth-stage to enterprise companies needing a single hub to collect, govern, and activate customer data across many downstream tools

features.name: connections
features.description: Customer data pipeline to collect first-party data from every touchpoint and route to 550+ destinations
features.evidence_quote: Collect first-party data from every touchpoint and activate it to the data warehouse or one of 550+ destinations

features.name: sources
features.description: SDKs and libraries to ingest data from web, mobile, server, and cloud apps
features.evidence_quote: Capture data from any source, enforce quality with schemas, unify customer identity

features.name: destinations
features.description: Send customer event data to 550+ third-party tools and platforms without re-instrumentation
features.evidence_quote: activate it to the data warehouse or one of 550+ destinations for a unified customer view

features.name: unify
features.description: Identity resolution that stitches cross-device and cross-channel events into a single persistent customer profile
features.evidence_quote: Create unified profiles, build advanced audiences, orchestrate real-time journeys

features.name: engage
features.description: Audience segmentation and multi-channel journey orchestration product built on unified profiles
features.evidence_quote: Create unified profiles, build advanced audiences, orchestrate real-time journeys, and enhance any experience with data from the warehouse

features.name: audiences
features.description: Build, preview, and activate behavioral and profile-based audience segments

features.name: journeys
features.description: Visual multi-step journey builder to orchestrate real-time cross-channel customer experiences

features.name: protocols
features.description: Data governance layer with tracking plans to enforce schema quality and catch bad events
features.evidence_quote: Protocols Overview, Create a Tracking Plan, Data Collection Best Practices

features.name: tracking plan
features.description: Schema definition tool to standardize event names, properties, and required fields across teams
features.evidence_quote: Create a Tracking Plan, Tracking Plan Libraries, Validate With Violations

features.name: tracking plan libraries
features.description: Reusable, shareable event schema libraries to propagate standards across workspaces

features.name: schema controls
features.description: Block or allow events based on whether they conform to the defined schema
features.evidence_quote: Enforce With Data Controls, Customize Your Schema Controls

features.name: transform
features.description: In-flight transformation to fix malformed or non-conforming event data before delivery

features.name: forward violations
features.description: Route schema-violating events to a separate destination for inspection instead of dropping them

features.name: anomaly detection
features.description: Automated detection of unexpected changes in event volume or schema structure

features.name: typewriter
features.description: Type-safe analytics client generator that auto-generates strongly-typed code from tracking plans

features.name: warehouses
features.description: Sync raw customer event and object data to cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, etc.)

features.name: reverse etl
features.description: Sync models and audiences from the data warehouse back into downstream activation tools

features.name: privacy portal
features.description: Centralized UI for managing data subject requests, PII suppression, and privacy compliance
features.evidence_quote: Privacy Portal, Detect PII, Data Controls and Alerts

features.name: pii detection
features.description: Automatically detect and optionally block PII from flowing into downstream destinations

features.name: consent management
features.description: Collect, store, and enforce user consent preferences across connections, audiences, and reverse ETL
features.evidence_quote: Consent Management Overview, Consent in Segment Connections, Configure Consent Management

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: Built-in tooling for GDPR including data deletion workflows and user suppression

features.name: hipaa eligibility
features.description: HIPAA-eligible infrastructure configuration for healthcare and regulated data handling

features.name: user deletion and suppression
features.description: Delete or permanently suppress specific user's data across all connected destinations
features.evidence_quote: User Deletion and Suppression, Account & Data Deletion

features.name: data retention policy
features.description: Configurable data retention windows with automated deletion after expiry

features.name: sso
features.description: SAML-based single sign-on for enterprise workspace authentication

features.name: scim
features.description: Automated user provisioning and deprovisioning via the SCIM protocol
features.evidence_quote: System for Cross-domain Identity Management (SCIM) Configuration Guide

features.name: mfa
features.description: Multi-factor authentication enforcement for workspace user accounts

features.name: audit trail
features.description: Immutable log of all workspace configuration changes and user actions

features.name: label-based access control
features.description: Fine-grained RBAC using labels to restrict team access to specific sources and destinations

features.name: roles and permissions
features.description: Role-based access control with predefined and custom roles for workspace members
features.evidence_quote: Identity & Access Management Overview, Concepts, Roles, Manage Workspace Access

features.name: monitor and alerts
features.description: Real-time pipeline health monitoring with default system alerts and configurable custom alerts
features.evidence_quote: Monitor Overview, Alerts Overview, Default Alerts, Custom Alerts

features.name: failure log collection
features.description: Capture and inspect events that failed delivery to destinations for debugging

features.name: replay
features.description: Re-send historical event data to a new or existing destination without re-instrumentation

features.name: regional data residency
features.description: Store and process customer data in specific geographic regions to satisfy compliance requirements

features.name: dbt extension
features.description: Native dbt integration to sync dbt models and expose warehouse transformations in Segment

features.name: git extension
features.description: Version-control tracking plans and workspace configurations via Git

features.name: public api
features.description: REST API for programmatic management of sources, destinations, and workspace resources

features.name: config api
features.description: API for programmatic configuration of all Segment workspace resources
features.evidence_quote: Config API overview, API design, Authentication

features.name: segment query language
features.description: SQL-like query language for filtering and querying event data within Segment

features.name: destination filter query language
features.description: Expression language for conditionally filtering individual events before sending to a destination

features.name: event filtering
features.description: Control which events and properties flow to each destination via filter rules

features.name: production and testing environments
features.description: Separate production and staging environments within a single Segment workspace
features.evidence_quote: Prod and Testing Environments in Segment

features.name: javascript sdk (analytics.js)
features.description: Browser-side analytics SDK for web event collection with auto-page tracking and bundled integrations

features.name: mobile sdks
features.description: Native SDKs for iOS (Swift) and Android (Kotlin) mobile event collection

features.name: server-side sdks
features.description: Server-side libraries for C#, Java, and other backend runtimes
features.evidence_quote: C#, Java, Javascript, Kotlin (Android), Swift, Other sources

features.name: integrations catalog
features.description: Browsable catalog of 750+ pre-built source and destination integrations
features.evidence_quote: Power the tools you already use with your data by enabling any of our 750+ integrations.

features.name: mtu-based billing
features.description: Usage-based billing model metered on Monthly Tracked Users (MTUs) and throughput volume

features.name: real-time data pipeline
features.description: Stream customer events in real time from collection through to destination delivery
features.evidence_quote: Collect real-time data in unified profiles

features.name: first-party data collection
features.description: Instrument owned properties to capture first-party behavioral and identity data
features.evidence_quote: Collect first-party data from every touchpoint

features.name: cross-channel identity resolution
features.description: Track and merge customer identity across web, mobile, email, and offline channels
features.evidence_quote: Tracking Customers Across Channels and Devices

features.name: historical data import
features.description: Backfill historical customer event data from legacy systems into Segment

features.name: duplicate data handling
features.description: Detect and suppress duplicate events to prevent double-counting in downstream tools

features.name: bot filtering
features.description: Identify and filter internet bot traffic from customer event streams

features.name: multi-channel re-engagement
features.description: Automated multi-channel re-engagement campaign orchestration for lapsed users

features.name: push notification support
features.description: Create and trigger mobile push notifications based on Segment events and audiences

features.name: event-triggered notifications
features.description: Set up alerts and operational notifications triggered by specific customer events
features.evidence_quote: Setting Up Event-Triggered Notifications or Alerts

features.name: ad spend optimization
features.description: Activate first-party audiences to advertising platforms to optimize ad targeting

features.name: attribution support
features.description: Capture and route event data to support marketing attribution and ROI measurement
features.evidence_quote: Measuring the ROI of Your Marketing Campaigns, Segment's Role in Attribution

features.name: ltv forecasting
features.description: SQL-based customer lifetime value forecasting guide for e-commerce
features.evidence_quote: Forecasting LTV with SQL and Excel for E-Commerce

features.name: dynamic coupon program
features.description: Build event-driven loyalty reward and coupon workflows using customer profile data
features.evidence_quote: Setting up a Dynamic Coupon Program to Reward Loyal Customers

features.name: support access
features.description: Temporarily grant Segment support staff scoped access to a workspace for troubleshooting

features.name: workspace home
features.description: Central dashboard showing pipeline health, recent activity, and workspace overview

features.name: data controls and alerts
features.description: Configure policy-based alerts when data quality issues or governance violations are detected

features.name: ai assistant (help center)
features.description: AI-powered chat assistant for answering questions and troubleshooting in the help center
features.evidence_quote: Chat with our AI assistant to get answers to your questions, troubleshoot, or find helpful information.

differentiators: 750+ pre-built integrations — largest catalog in the CDP category
Part of Twilio platform — native communications (SMS, WhatsApp, RCS, voice, email) activation alongside CDP without additional vendors
Collect once, route everywhere — single instrumentation eliminates per-tool tracking code
Real-time event streaming with sub-second latency to 550+ destinations
HIPAA-eligible infrastructure for regulated healthcare use cases
Regional data residency for compliance-sensitive global customers
Developer-first architecture with typed SDKs, public API, and Typewriter code generation
End-to-end platform: collect → govern (Protocols) → unify (Unify) → activate (Engage) → communicate (Twilio) on one stack
Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for CPaaS (2026) — highest Ability to Execute

praised: 'Track once, send everywhere' architecture dramatically reduces engineering instrumentation burden
Large integrations catalog (750+) is a primary reason teams choose Segment
Developer experience: typed SDKs, strong docs, and open-source libraries on GitHub
Monolith architecture decision discussed positively: 'Why Segment Went Back to a Monolith' (604 upvotes, 316 comments on HN)
complaints: G2 review data was not available in provided sources
MTU-based pricing model can become expensive at scale for high-traffic products (inferred from docs billing section prominence)

free_tier.limits: Limits not specified in scraped pricing page content; 'Start for free' CTA present on landing

pricing.notes: Pricing page content did not render tier cards in the scraped source — only nav and header loaded. Billing is MTU (Monthly Tracked Users) + throughput based per docs ('MTUs, Throughput and Billing'). 'Start for free' CTA on landing confirms free tier exists. Full tier pricing structure not available in provided source data. Changelog returned 404.
